## Summary / 摘要

-

## Scope / 范围

- [ ] Matches the current roadmap or an accepted issue.
- [ ] Avoids out-of-scope V0.1 features such as payments, Workflow, Agent, or Marketplace.

- [ ] 符合当前路线图或已接受的 issue。
- [ ] 不引入支付、Workflow、Agent、Marketplace 等 V0.1 范围外功能。

## Checks / 检查

- [ ] `pnpm typecheck`
- [ ] `pnpm build`
- [ ] Documentation updated in English and Chinese when needed.

- [ ] 已运行 `pnpm typecheck`
- [ ] 已运行 `pnpm build`
- [ ] 如有需要，已同步更新中英双语文档。
